message:
Add tutorial cross-references to operator and function pages

Reference pages for operators and functions used in tutorials now
link back to those tutorials via See Also sections. This improves
discoverability by helping users find practical examples.

Tutorials referenced:
- plot-data-with-charts
- learn-idiomatic-tql
- write-a-package
- map-data-to-ocsf

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ example: 'mean([1,2,3])'
 
 import Fn from '@components/see-also/Fn.astro';
 import Guide from '@components/see-also/Guide.astro';
+import Tutorial from '@components/see-also/Tutorial.astro';
 
 Computes the mean of all grouped values.
 
@@ -44,3 +45,5 @@ summarize avg=mean(x)
 - <Fn>sum</Fn>

+- <Tutorial>plot-data-with-charts</Tutorial>
+- <Tutorial>learn-idiomatic-tql</Tutorial>

+import Tutorial from '@components/see-also/Tutorial.astro';
+
